stakeholder_use: Most direct way to add capacity; compare availability hours gained with KPI improvement.
Useful if pharmacy cannot recruit pharmacists quickly; effect depends on whether technicians can cover bottleneck tasks.

cost_proxy: medium to high upfront, lower recurring
stakeholder_use: More scalable than staffing if it reduces mean task time; variance-only improvements are less valuable in current outputs.

effort_proxy: standardisation, training, upstream ward/medic behaviour change
stakeholder_use: Reduces avoidable workload; upstream discrepancy reduction has larger volume impact than medic-error reduction.

cost_proxy: medium to high depending on senior capacity
effort_proxy: senior pharmacist time, prescribing governance, rota design
stakeholder_use: May reduce medic-error loop but can shift work to already constrained senior pharmacists.

cost_proxy: scenario stress test, not a standalone intervention
effort_proxy: temporary staffing, weekend cover, prioritisation rules
stakeholder_use: Tests whether a strategy still works under highest observed 4-week demand or backlog pressure.

cost_proxy: assumption/sensitivity, not an intervention by itself
implementation_time_proxy: none for model; operationally major if hours change
stakeholder_use: Checks whether current 09:00-19:00 weekday baseline is optimistic relative to Nathan's 09:00-17:00 note.
